final:
// // This module implements an 8-bit shift register that operates on the falling edge of the clock signal. When the reset input is active, the output is initialized to zero. If the shift control signal is asserted, the register shifts its current data to the left by one bit, inserting the least significant bit from the input data. If the shift control signal is deactivated, the register shifts its current data to the right by one bit, inserting the most significant bit from the input data.
module top_module(
    input clk, 
    input reset, 
    input shift, 
    input [7:0] data_in, 
    output reg [7:0] data_out
);always @ (posedge clk) begin
        if (reset) begin
            data_out <= 8'h00;
        end else begin
            if (shift) begin
                data_out <= {data_in[0], data_out[7:1]};
            end else begin
                data_out <= {data_out[6:0], data_in[7]};
            end
        end
    end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module implements an 8-bit shift register that operates on the falling edge of the clock signal. When the reset input is active, the output is initialized to zero. If the shift control signal is asserted, the register shifts its current data to the left by one bit, inserting the least significant bit from the input data. If the shift control signal is deactivated, the register shifts its current data to the right by one bit, inserting the most significant bit from the input data.
